{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004035C7557EB40F6DE774BC5E"}"},"total":628},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7540601292969198398","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢，这个是我看过龙珠同人最舒服的小说都是总感觉后面20章，剧情有点急躁但是不影响它的质量，超级赛亚人七，万千悟空合体让我没想到，也特别棒，值得可以看","text_exts":[{"e":15,"s":11,"text":"龙珠同人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E7%8F%A0%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774197635E774BC5E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227540601292969198398%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227314025177120001086%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E7%8F%A0%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755685814,"group_id":"7314025177120001086","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2MDVYzhA+zkXV7F3ZpTxX+zWnaBZS/ZyQoB81KeDktW","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3729188044953831","user_name":"阿湑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3729188044953831","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7314025177120001086","book_info":{"abstract":"在另一个龙珠gt时间，孙悟空的命运截然不同。
因为舍命抵挡超级一星龙的负向能源弹，肉身被毁，灵魂消失，再次出现时发现自己竟重生到14年前。
带着未来的记忆，孙悟空发誓自己决不会重蹈覆辙，可当时间一点一点过去他越发的感到不对劲。
这个世界，貌似跟他原本的世界不太一样。
除了界王神，还有破坏神，天使，大神官，全王这类至高无上的存在。
这个世界强者众多，高手如云，让重生的gt孙悟空更兴奋了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c05781b0b674128a4cc3a18ea116ecf3","author":"龙珠卡卡罗特","author_id":"","book_id":"7314025177120001086","book_name":"龙珠：这个GT悟空，太超模！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6032人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":376,"name":"龙珠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=376&name=龙珠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7314025180429287998","read_count":"6032","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"582549"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"258","tags":"动漫衍生,重生,二次元,龙珠,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/63f0e00e47c21ae670e00981df101c9f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779381635&x-signature=cuHD9qaMcR0VdW7%2BaA%2FmJE5hdn0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2233806990353303","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"272"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004035C7557EB40F6DE774BC5E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_
